name: bluenexus-agent-builder
description: Lets any Claude agent (running with Claude in Chrome) speed-build a full agent on the BlueNexus platform. It interviews the user for a brief (audience, guardrails, core workflow, connectors, dashboard), then drives the BlueNexus studio to build and publish the agent end to end: identity, guardrails, skills, onboarding, dashboard page, and publish. Domain-agnostic.
